updates.summary: Add Audio Studio settings and preset management
updates.description: Bring Audio Studio closer to the Guitar Trainer app with its own settings screen and version log.
changes: Add Settings panel with adjustable font size
Save Audio Studio settings to local storage and signed-in cloud data
Add user preset rename and delete actions
Add Audio Studio-specific versions.json update history
Extend shared service worker support for Audio Studio assets
